# thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights

WANI Integration Service API V1
- API version: 7.0.0
  - Build date: 2023-12-20T12:21:03.187424Z[Europe/Lisbon]

APIs for onboarding WANI


*Automatically generated by the [OpenAPI Generator](https://openapi-generator.tech)*


## Requirements

Building the API client library requires:
1. Java 1.8+
2. Maven (3.8.3+)/Gradle (7.2+)

## Installation

To install the API client library to your local Maven repository, simply execute:

```shell
mvn clean install
```

To deploy it to a remote Maven repository instead, configure the settings of the repository and execute:

```shell
mvn clean deploy
```

Refer to the [OSSRH Guide](http://central.sonatype.org/pages/ossrh-guide.html) for more information.

### Maven users

Add this dependency to your project's POM:

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.openapitools</groupId>
  <artifactId>thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights</artifactId>
  <version>7.0.0</version>
  <scope>compile</scope>
</dependency>
```


### Gradle users

Add this dependency to your project's build file:

```groovy
  repositories {
    mavenCentral()     // Needed if the 'thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights' jar has been published to maven central.
    mavenLocal()       // Needed if the 'thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights' jar has been published to the local maven repo.
  }

  dependencies {
     implementation "org.openapitools:thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights:7.0.0"
  }
```

### Others

At first generate the JAR by executing:

```shell
mvn clean package
```

Then manually install the following JARs:

* `target/thousandeyes-java-sdk-wan-insights-7.0.0.jar`
* `target/lib/*.jar`

## Getting Started

Please follow the [installation](#installation) instruction and execute the following Java code:

```java

// Import classes:
import com.thousandeyes.api.wan.ApiClient;
import com.thousandeyes.api.wan.ApiException;
import com.thousandeyes.api.wan.Configuration;
import com.thousandeyes.api.wan.models.*;
import com.thousandeyes.api.wan.insights.WaniOnboardingApi;

public class Example {
  public static void main(String[] args) {
    ApiClient defaultClient = Configuration.getDefaultApiClient();
    defaultClient.setBasePath("http://api.thousandeyes.com");

    WaniOnboardingApi apiInstance = new WaniOnboardingApi(defaultClient);
    ActivationRequest activationRequest = new ActivationRequest(); // ActivationRequest | activationRequest
    try {
      ActivationResponse result = apiInstance.activateWanInsightsForOverlayUsingPOST(activationRequest);
      System.out.println(result);
    } catch (ApiException e) {
      System.err.println("Exception when calling WaniOnboardingApi#activateWanInsightsForOverlayUsingPOST");
      System.err.println("Status code: " + e.getCode());
      System.err.println("Reason: " + e.getResponseBody());
      System.err.println("Response headers: " + e.getResponseHeaders());
      e.printStackTrace();
    }
  }
}

```
